title: IamResources
description:
The IAM resource that enables Amazon Web Services IoT FleetWise edge agent software to send data to Amazon Timestream.

For more information, see IAM roles in the Identity and Access Management User Guide.

allOf.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the IAM resource that allows Amazon Web Services IoT FleetWise to send data to Amazon Timestream. For example, arn:aws:iam::123456789012:role/SERVICE-ROLE-ARN.
